verifies: mlx 0.32.0 compatibility on top of the pinned environment in eval/receipts/hy3_environment.json

verification_summary.fp32_router_patch: applies unchanged; MoEGate.__call__ call site byte-identical in shape to what RESTORE.md documents
verification_summary.quantized_op_parity: gather_qmm (transpose=True, bits=2/3/4) and slice_update bit-exact or noise-level identical vs 0.31.2, targeted at the 0.32.0 release-note fixes (qmm_naive K-tail dispatch, slice-update indexing, contiguity computation) -- those are CUDA-path fixes per the changelog and did not perturb the Metal path here
verification_summary.coherence: byte-identical output on both mlx versions for math_probability and json_crossfield prompts against hy3-demolition-mlx-reap25-v1-fused (streamed loader, peak_memory_gb 24.78 identical on both)
verification_summary.known_toolcall_regression: reproduces identically on 0.32.0, not worse, not fixed -- all 3 tool-call prompts (search_flights, get_weather, create_event) show tool_sep_present=False on both mlx versions, byte-identical raw output; confirms the bug is in the mlx-lm fork / chat template interaction, unrelated to the mlx core package
verification_summary.recommendation: GO -- safe upgrade, no local_patches changes needed (only mlx-lm needs the fp32-router patch, untouched by this bump)

verified_by: Fable 5 agent, isolated scratch venv (real .venv untouched during verification), real hardware (M5 Max 128GB), real reap25 checkpoint via streaming loader
applied_to_real_venv: 2026-07-09, by Sonnet 5 after this verification passed
